indication: AFINITOR is a kinase inhibitor indicated for the treatment of adults with renal angiomyolipoma and tuberous sclerosis complex (TSC), not requiring immediate surgery.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to everolimus for the treatment of adult patients with renal angiomyolipoma and tuberous sclerosis complex (TSC), not requiring immediate surgery.

document.name: Afinitor (everolimus) [package insert]. FDA.
